# Session Handoff

## Task

(What was being worked on — one line)

## Status

(Overall status: completed | in-progress | blocked)

## Completed

(What's done — bullet list of concrete deliverables)

## In Progress

(What's partially done — include file paths and current state)

## Failed Approaches

(What was tried and didn't work, and WHY — this prevents the next session from repeating mistakes)

## Key Decisions

(Choices made and rationale — the next session needs to know these to stay consistent)

## Dependencies

(Things that must happen in order, or external blockers)

## User Preferences

(What the user explicitly asked for or rejected during this session)

## Next Steps

(Concrete actions for the next session to pick up)

## Files Modified

(Deterministic list: paths of all files created or changed)

## Commands Run

(Key commands and their outcomes — especially builds, tests, deploys)
